changes.value:
File: swissarmyhammer-code-context/src/lsp_worker.rs (42.1%, 73 uncovered lines)

Uncovered functions:
- `spawn_lsp_indexing_worker()` (lines 82-107): thread spawn and error path
- `run_lsp_indexing_loop()` (lines 114-212): shutdown signaling, empty extensions warning, dirty file query, client lock poisoned recovery, client unavailable sleep, per-file indexing with error marking
- `index_single_file()` (lines 221-252): file read, didOpen, collect_and_persist, didClose, error warning

These are integration-heavy (threading, mutex, LSP). Consider:
- Unit test with mock SharedLspClient (None) to test unavailable path
- Test shutdown flag terminates loop
- Test index_single_file with mock client

Acceptance: coverage >= 60% for lsp_worker.rs
Test LSP worker loop: client unavailability, batch processing, error recovery
